# SKCS Online Shopping

SKCS Online Shopping is a global AI-powered shopping and booking platform.

The platform helps users compare prices across multiple marketplaces,
including Amazon, AliExpress, eBay, and regional retailers.

## Core Features

- AI Shopping Assistant
- Global Product Price Comparison
- Travel & Booking Integration
- Marketplace Deal Discovery

## Website

https://www.skcs.co.za

## Pages

/  
/deals  
/category  
/assistant  
/bookings

## Description

SKCS uses artificial intelligence to help users find the best deals
from global marketplaces quickly and efficiently.
